summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated preflight artifact marks no refs security-sensitive and provides live state for 20 of 25 listed PRs; no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR-creation mutations are recommended. Open hydrated PRs are kept as independent work items; already-closed hydrated PRs are skipped with keep_closed; refs missing from the compacted preflight are blocked for human/live-state hydration.
